prompt: I've already got itwillsync running with a couple sessions. I opened a new terminal tab and I can't remember the URL to get back to the dashboard, and I also want to see how long my sessions have been alive. What commands do I run?

assertions.text: Response includes `npx itwillsync hub info` for retrieving the dashboard URL
Response includes `npx itwillsync hub status` for listing session uptimes
Response explains what each command does differently — not just listing both without distinguishing them
Response does NOT tell the user to restart itwillsync to find the URL (which would be wrong — hub info is the right approach)
